intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern! I was abducted last night! They took me to their ship!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Uh huh. What'd they look like?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Little green guys! Big heads! They probed me, Vern!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern! Aliens abducted me! For real!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Green skin, big eyes, the whole thing! They said they'd be back!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *snickering* Okay okay, I made it up.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, you're on. What's your story?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I was abducted by aliens last night. I'm not making this up.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Bright light, floated up to the ship, little gray beings everywhere. Classic stuff, you know?

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Classic stuff. That's the problem. Next caller.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *bursts out laughing* Sorry Vern, couldn't resist!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, you're not gonna believe this - full alien abduction, last night!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Beam of light, taken aboard, they ran tests! I've got scoop marks to prove it!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send photos of those marks. We'll see.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Ah man, I'm just messing with you. Good show though!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Little green men! Spaceship! Probes! The whole nine yards!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *cracking up* I'm sorry, I had to! Love the show!
